ddls:
CREATE TABLE "education_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the education indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the indicator was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the indicator (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "subregion" TEXT /* Subregion within the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the country information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the education indicator */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the data is recorded */,
  "student_ratio" REAL /* Student ratio or other educational metric */,
  "enrollment_rate" REAL /* Enrollment rate for the given year */,
  "teacher_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of teachers to students */,
  "dropout_rate" REAL /* Dropout rate for the given year */,
  "gender_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of male to female students */,
  "flag_codes" TEXT /* Codes for flags indicating issues or special notes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_data_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_data_flag_codes FOREIGN KEY ("flag_codes") REFERENCES flags ("flag_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES education_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data version (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who reviewed the version */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES education_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flags" (
  "flag_code" TEXT /* Code for the flag */,
  "flag_description" TEXT /* Description of the flag and its meaning */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the flag (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the flag description was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES education_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to make the change (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the data before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the data after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES education_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report's content */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the report is stored */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
